sourcesContent:
import Navbar from "../components/Navbar"; import { useState } from "react"; const getInitials = (name) => name.replace("Chef ", "").split(" ").map(n => n[0]).join("").slice(0, 2); export default function RecipeDetailPage({ recipe, setPage, onBack }) { const [checkedIngredients, setCheckedIngredients] = useState({}); if (!recipe) return null; const stepImages = recipe.stepImages || []; let imgIdx = 0; const toggleIngredient = (idx) => { setCheckedIngredients(prev => ({ ...prev, [idx]: !prev[idx] })); }; return (
{/* Breadcrumbs */}
/ {recipe.tag}
{/* LEFT: Main Content */}

{recipe.title}

{getInitials(recipe.chef)}
{recipe.chef}
Published Oct 24, 2023
★ {recipe.rating} ({recipe.reviews} Reviews)
{/* Ingredients */}

Ingredients

{recipe.ingredients.length} items
{recipe.ingredients.map((ing, i) => (
toggleIngredient(i)} style={{ display: "flex", alignItems: "center", gap: "16px", padding: "16px 0", borderBottom: "1px solid #f1f5f9", cursor: "pointer", transition: "opacity 0.2s" }} >
{checkedIngredients[i] && "✓"}
{ing.name}
{ing.note}
))}
{/* Instructions */}

Instructions

{recipe.steps.map((step, i) => { const img = step.hasImage ? stepImages[imgIdx++] : null; return (
{i + 1}

{step.title}

{step.body}

{img && (
)}
); })}
{/* RIGHT: Sidebar */}
📋 Recipe Overview
{[ { icon: "⏱️", label: "Prep Time", val: recipe.prepTime }, { icon: "🔥", label: "Cook Time", val: recipe.cookTime }, { icon: "👥", label: "Servings", val: recipe.servings }, { icon: "⚡", label: "Calories", val: recipe.calories }, { icon: "📈", label: "Difficulty", val: recipe.difficulty }, { icon: "🌍", label: "Cuisine", val: recipe.cuisine } ].map((item, i) => (
{item.icon}
{item.label}
{item.val}
))}
{recipe.tip && (
💡 Chef's Secret Tip

"{recipe.tip}"

)}
); }
